title: What parts of yourself do you see in Evangelions characters
display_title: What parts of yourself do you see in Evangelions characters
wikitext:
[]: What parts of yourself do you see in Evangelion's characters?             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Sun Sep 10, 2017 2:29 am I've found that I share a few traits with all of the main cast of Eva . Like Shinji, I often seek the approval of others. Like Misato, I often distract myself by focusing on having fun. Like Rei, I sometimes feel confused by social interactions. Like Asuka, I sometimes feel anger when people don't act the way I want them to.

[]: Re: What parts of yourself do you see in Evangelion's characters?             Quote Post by Depressed Corn Man » Sun Sep 10, 2017 3:43 pm Like everyone in the same show, I think I fear being alone more than anything else. I often go out of my way to get others to like me, helping them with things I don't want to do.

[]: Re: What parts of yourself do you see in Evangelion's characters?             Quote Post by The Divine Emperor » Sun Oct 01, 2017 9:45 pm Depressed Corn Man wrote: Like everyone in the same show, I think I fear being alone more than anything else.

[]: Re: What parts of yourself do you see in Evangelion's characters?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Oct 16, 2017 8:16 pm I'm currently in this weird place where my position and struggles in life begins to be closer to Misato's than that of the Pilots.

[]: Re: What parts of yourself do you see in Evangelion's characters?             Quote Post by robersora » Mon Oct 16, 2017 8:25 pm ^ Hang in there. It's painful, but necessary. I just hope, I'll never have to relate to Gendou... Wouldn't mind relating to Fuyutsuki that much, though.

[]: Re: What parts of yourself do you see in Evangelion's characters?             Quote Post by ArvisTaljik » Tue Oct 17, 2017 10:14 am I'd have to say that I'm also closest to Misato than any other character. I'm active duty military, doing what I can to take my career where I want it to go (ultimately to retirement before I turn 40 ) but sometimes things happen that are just totally beyond your control. Luckily, the 2-star that I work for is NOTHING like Gendo, so there's that.

[]: Re: What parts of yourself do you see in Evangelion's characters?             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Tue Oct 17, 2017 7:02 pm ArvisTaljik wrote: I'd have to say that I'm also closest to Misato than any other character. I'm active duty military, doing what I can to take my career where I want it to go (ultimately to retirement before I turn 40 ) but sometimes things happen that are just totally beyond your control. Luckily, the 2-star that I work for is NOTHING like Gendo, so there's that.

[]: Re: What parts of yourself do you see in Evangelion's characters?             Quote Post by ArvisTaljik » Tue Oct 17, 2017 8:12 pm Cybermat47 wrote: Sweet man, what branch and role are you?
